attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
  BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM,
  BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT,
  BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT,
  BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM,
  BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID,
  BK_AMEX_TRVL_HOTEL_SEQ_NUM_INT,
  HOTEL_BOOKING_TYPE_CD,
  HOTEL_PHONE_NUM,
  HOTEL_NAME,
  HOTEL_STREET_ADDR,
  HOTEL_CITY_NAME,
  HOTEL_STATE_OR_PROVINCE_CD,
  HOTEL_ARRIVAL_DT,
  HOTEL_DEPARTURE_DT,
  HOTEL_POSTAL_CD,
  HOTEL_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
  HOTEL_CITY_CD,
  HOTEL_BOOKING_CONFIRMATION_NUM,
  RPTD_HOTEL_CURRENCY_EXCHNG_RT,
  HOTEL_CHAIN_CD,
  HOTEL_DOMESTIC_INTL_CD,
  AGENCY_COMMISSION_AMT,
  NO_OF_GUESTS_IN_ROOM_NUM_CNT,
  RESERVED_NIGHTS_CNT,
  MAXIMUM_PASSENGER_INT_NUM,
  HOTEL_BILLING_LOCAL_AMT,
  LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,
  AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID,
  DAILY_ROOM_REPORTING_RT_AMT,
  HOTEL_ROOMS_RESERVED_CNT,
  HOTEL_ROOM_TYPE_CD,
  HOTEL_REASON_CD,
  AMADEUS_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM,
  GALILEO_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM,
  APOLLO_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM,
  SABRE_HOTEL_PROPERTY_NUM,
  BK_HOTEL_COMPLIANCE_CD 
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_AMEX_TRVL_INVOICE_DETL_HOTEL WTIDH
WHERE NOT EXISTS(
	   SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRVL_INVOICE_DETL_HOTEL NTIDH
	  			 WHERE 
				   	 WTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  NTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
				   AND   WTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT     =  NTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT
				   AND   WTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT=  NTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
				   AND   WTIDH.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM=  NTIDH.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
				   AND   WTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID   =  NTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID
				   AND   WTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_HOTEL_SEQ_NUM_INT=  NTIDH.BK_AMEX_TRVL_HOTEL_SEQ_NUM_INT
       )
